meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop starting and start finishing. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your first portfolio-ready AI application today.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates the 'blank canvas' paralysis by providing a structured, production-ready foundation. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate architecture and focus purely on core logic. This workflow transforms overwhelming development cycles into manageable, iterative sprints, ensuring you actually cross the finish line.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: a folder full of half-baked repositories, a graveyard of 'Hello World' apps, and the crushing weight of unfinished potential. The gap between a clever idea and a deployed product isn't just lack of skill—it’s a lack of structure. You are burning your creative fuel on project setup instead of feature building.

Today, we kill that cycle. We are deploying the Antigravity project template, a high-octane starter kit designed to get you from zero to deployed in record time. Combined with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you won’t just write code; you will architect software like a senior engineer. Let’s turn your 'someday' projects into your 'done' portfolio.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade environment immediately. This step pulls the core architecture, preventing configuration drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard stack with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Core Logic with AI Context
steps.description: Inject your specific business logic into the template so the AI understands your unique constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and create a prompt that defines our MVP scope: a task management system with user authentication.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Define MVP scope for task management system'

steps.title: Automated Component Generation
steps.description: Use the template's design system to generate UI components, ensuring consistent styling without manual CSS work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library.

steps.title: Database Schema Mapping
steps.description: Map your application requirements to a persistent database layer automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the database schema for a task management app, including users and task tables, and generate the migration files.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate Supabase migration files for tasks'

steps.title: Deployment and Verification
steps.description: Verify your build and push to production to finalize the project milestone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the test suite and verify the build passes before deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Verify build and deploy to Vercel'

pro_tips: Always commit your code after every successful Claude Code task to create a granular undo history.
Use the 'antigravity.config.json' file to prune unnecessary dependencies before you start coding to keep your bundle size lean.
Treat the AI as a junior dev: be specific about variable naming conventions to keep your codebase maintainable.
When stuck, ask Claude to 'Explain the architectural trade-offs of this approach' to learn why the template is structured that way.
Never manually edit generated UI code; ask the AI to refactor it to maintain structural integrity across the app.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, document the challenges you overcame in a README file to prepare for your next technical interview.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow used by top-tier engineers to ship products that actually get finished. Stop dreaming, start building. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
